numberOfCertificates.description: The number of certificates associated to a specific stock designation

dollarAmountRaised.description: The stock designation total dollar amount raised derived from the number of certificates issued multiplied by the price of each certificate.

amountRaisedCurrency.description: The three letter currency code of the currency used in the calculation of the amount raised

parValue.description: Par value for the stock designation

pricePerShare.description: Price per share for the stock designation

pricePerShareCurrency.description: The three letter currency code of the price per share currency

filingDate.description: The date of the stock filing

conversionRatio.description: When the stock designation is convertible, this ratio represents number of converted shares to each original share

rounding.description: Rounding type used when converting shares from the stock designation

convertsToStockDesignationName.description: Name for the stock designation which the stock designation converts to

convertsToStockDesignationId.description: Identifier for the stock designation which the stock designation converts to

totalAuthorizedShares.description: Total number of authorized shares for the stock designation

totalAvailableShares.description: Total available shares across the stock designations for the class

totalOutstandingShares.description: Total outstanding shares across the stock designations for the class

totalCommonStockEquivalentShares.description: Total common equivalent (a.k.a. fully diluted) shares across the stock designations for the class

percentOwnership.description: Percentage representing the fraction of total common equivalent (a.k.a. fully diluted) shares for the stock designation

percentDiluted.description: Percentage representing the fraction of total common equivalent (a.k.a fully diluted) and available shares for the stock designation

percentOutstanding.description: Percentage of fully diluted outstanding shares across all types of securities
